title: 'My work' as template to share with other users within company account
excerpt: Hi, I have customized ‘My work’ view. And I would like to share it with other users in my company - so anyone could see ‘My work’ in similiar manner within their accounts (obviously I would not like to make this customiz…

posts.author: pegam (Przemek Gamdzyk)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, I have customized ‘My work’ view. And I would like to share it with other users in my company - so anyone could see ‘My work’ in similiar manner within their accounts (obviously I would not like to make this customization manually - user by user, especially when I got quite a lot of this users). I got reply from the helpdesk that most natural approach is not possible in Monday - to save ‘My work’ as template and then open this template by other users. Does anyone have any workarounds?

posts.author: RickK (Rick Kinney)
posts.cookedHtml:
Bumping for great justice! I too would like this as a feature!

This is something I was able to do easily in Smartsheets… I SHOULD be able to do this in a superior platform like Monday as well!
